rationale.remediation-gating: Failed milestones get bounded autonomous fixes with halved budgets and fail-closed exhaustion.
rationale.ai-review: Independent LLM verifier issues verdicts and empirically catches substantive defects.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Independent verification runs tests and CI-backed acceptance checks.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Humans can pause, resume, or bootstrap-reset autonomous development asynchronously.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Dashboard streams reasoning, tool calls, edits, status, costs, and archived reports.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent milestone, issue, report, and decision histories support human inspection.
rationale.quality-debt: Agents introduced accuracy and similarity regressions requiring corrective rework.
rationale.framework: Reusable orchestration architecture integrates planning, execution, verification, and oversight.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented an open-source orchestrator, tracker, harness, and monitoring dashboard.
rationale.agentic: Autonomous agents plan and deliver multi-step milestone-scale software changes.
rationale.steering: Human issues, specifications, and success criteria substantively redirect generation.
